title: Senior AI / Machine Learning Engineer
core_competencies: Large-scale data processing and feature engineering (Pandas, Spark)
Model performance tuning (quantization, pruning, distillation)
LLM fine-tuning (LoRA, PEFT) and prompt engineering
Distributed training across multi-GPU / multi-node environments
Vector search and retrieval systems (RAG pipelines)
Production API deployment and model serving (REST/gRPC)
MLOps lifecycle management (CI/CD for ML, monitoring, drift detection)
soft_skills: Ethical AI design and bias mitigation
experience_benchmarks: Deployed large-scale ML/LLM systems serving millions of requests/day
Reduced model inference latency by 40–80% via optimization techniques
Built and maintained distributed training pipelines on terabyte-scale datasets
Implemented RAG systems improving answer accuracy by measurable metrics
Productionized research models into stable, monitored services
industry_standard_summary: Senior AI engineer specializing in scalable ML systems and LLM-powered applications, with deep expertise in transformer architectures, real-time inference optimization, and production deployment.

title: Staff Data Scientist
core_competencies: Advanced statistical modeling and hypothesis testing
Design and analysis of A/B and multivariate experiments
Causal inference (propensity scoring, uplift modeling)
Feature engineering and predictive modeling at scale
Bayesian modeling and probabilistic reasoning
Customer behavior modeling and segmentation
Data pipeline design for analytics and experimentation
experience_benchmarks: Drove measurable revenue or growth impact through data products ($XM+ impact)
Designed and scaled experimentation platforms across multiple teams
Improved model accuracy and business KPIs through iterative experimentation
Led end-to-end analytics initiatives influencing product roadmap
Validated statistical significance for high-stakes business decisions
industry_standard_summary: Senior data science leader focused on applying rigorous statistical methods and experimentation frameworks to drive strategic business decisions and measurable impact.

title: Principal Security Engineer (SecOps)
core_competencies: Advanced penetration testing and vulnerability assessment
Threat modeling and attack surface analysis
Incident detection, response, and forensic investigation
Identity and Access Management (IAM) architecture
Cloud security and zero-trust implementations
Security automation within CI/CD pipelines
Compliance frameworks (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA)
experience_benchmarks: Led incident response for critical security breaches with minimal downtime
Reduced vulnerability remediation time by over 50%
Implemented organization-wide security monitoring and alerting systems
Maintained zero critical security incidents across production systems
Successfully passed multiple external security audits and compliance checks
industry_standard_summary: Principal-level security engineer specializing in proactive threat detection, incident response, and building automated security systems across cloud-native environments.

title: Principal Backend Architect
core_competencies: Design of large-scale distributed systems
Microservices architecture and service decomposition
Event-driven systems and message queue design
API design, versioning, and gateway management
Database architecture (sharding, replication, indexing)
Performance optimization and scalability engineering
Reliability engineering and fault-tolerant systems
experience_benchmarks: Designed systems handling 100k–1M+ requests per second
Led migration from monolith to microservices architecture
Achieved 99.99%+ system uptime with robust failover strategies
Optimized system latency and throughput under high load conditions
Defined architectural standards adopted across engineering teams
industry_standard_summary: Principal backend architect focused on designing highly scalable, resilient, and maintainable systems powering mission-critical applications.

title: Technical Product Manager (TPM)
core_competencies: End-to-end product lifecycle ownership from ideation to launch and iteration
Roadmap prioritization based on business impact, technical feasibility, and user needs
Agile/Scrum execution with engineering teams (sprint planning, backlog grooming)
User journey mapping and experience optimization across digital touchpoints
Data-driven decision making using product analytics and experimentation
Defining and tracking KPIs (retention, conversion, engagement)
Translating business requirements into technical specifications
soft_skills: Influencing cross-functional teams without direct authority
Strong user empathy and customer-centric thinking
experience_benchmarks: Launched 0→1 products from concept to market with measurable adoption
Improved user retention and engagement through iterative feature optimization
Defined and scaled product metrics frameworks across teams
Led cross-functional initiatives involving engineering, design, and business
Delivered features that contributed directly to revenue or growth KPIs
industry_standard_summary: Technical product leader responsible for bridging business strategy and engineering execution, delivering user-centric products through data-driven prioritization and cross-functional collaboration.
